metadata.name: twig-scss-toolkit
metadata.summary: A tool to convert HTML to Twig and CSS to SCSS

modules.name: twig-scss-toolkit
documentation: A tool to convert HTML to Twig and CSS to SCSS.

functions.name: twig-scss-toolkit.cli.main
documentation: Convert HTML to Twig and CSS to SCSS.

functions.name: twig-scss-toolkit.cli.html2twig
documentation: Convert HTML file to Twig format.

functions.name: twig-scss-toolkit.cli.css2scss
documentation: Convert CSS file to SCSS using variables from SCSS file.

functions.name: twig-scss-toolkit.css_converter.parse_variable_file
documentation:
Parses SCSS variable content and returns color name to value mapping.

Args:
    variable_content (str): SCSS variable content
    
Returns:
    dict: Mapping of color values to variable names

functions.name: twig-scss-toolkit.css_converter.convert_css_to_scss
documentation:
Converts CSS content to SCSS by replacing color values with variables.

Args:
    css_content (str): CSS content to convert
    variable_mapping (dict): Mapping of color values to variable names
    
Returns:
    str: Converted SCSS content

functions.name: twig-scss-toolkit.html_converter.convert_html_to_twig
documentation:
Converts HTML content to Twig format.

Args:
    html_content (str): HTML content to convert
    
Returns:
    str: Converted Twig content or None if conversion fails

Raises:
    Exception: If conversion fails
